Trigger.Name: WHEN-NEW-FORM-INSTANCE
WHEN-BUTTON-PRESSED
POST-QUERY
WHEN-BUTTON-PRESSED

RecordGroup.Name: RG_LEAVE_TYPES
RecordGroup.QueryText: SELECT LEAVE_TYPE_ID, LEAVE_TYPE_CODE, LEAVE_TYPE_NAME FROM HRMS.LEAVE_TYPES WHERE ACTIVE_FLAG = 'Y' ORDER BY LEAVE_TYPE_NAME

Alert.Name: ALT_CONFIRM_CANCEL
Alert.Title: Confirm Cancellation
Alert.Message: Are you sure you want to cancel this leave request?
